title: AI Agent
description: Profiles, courses and support base for the WhatsApp assistant.
connDesc: Turn the agent on/off, tune debounce and the test allowlist per WhatsApp number.
connEnabledHint: Turn off = kill-switch: the bot stops on this connection instantly.
connDebounceHint: Wait after the last message before replying (groups consecutive messages).
connAllowlistHint: Empty = replies to everyone. Fill (one number per line, digits only) to reply ONLY to those — test mode.
connAutoUnassignHint: 0 = off. An assigned conversation idle longer than this loses its assignee and returns to the Queue.
connEmpty: No connection has the agent configured.
adminOnly: Only admins can manage the agent.
duplicate: A record with this identifier already exists.
profilesDesc: Each profile is an assignable owner, with its own persona, model and tools.
p_personaPlaceholder: You are Ruth, Milla's sales assistant...
p_toolsHint: Only the selected ones are used. Control tools (handoff, end) are always included.
p_toolsAll: ✓ All enabled (nothing to select). Select only to LIMIT this profile.
coursesDesc: Records the agent reads to quote and send enrollment links.
supportDesc: FAQ the agent reads to answer student questions.
